{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Archmage of sealing and binding
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator is a [[Galactic Union]]-certified [[Archmage of sealing and binding]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The protagonist is an [[Archmage]] in sealing and [[binding]] magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
